subgoals.description: Retrieve venue_id from the venue database using available venue details such as name or address
subgoals.success_criterion: venue_id is successfully retrieved and stored in the system

subgoals.description: Update the proposal data structure to include the retrieved venue_id
subgoals.success_criterion: proposal contains a valid venue_id field

subgoals.description: Submit the updated proposal for structured processing to verify normalization success
subgoals.success_criterion: structured processing accepts the proposal without normalization errors
